# Synclaw

> Synclaw is a real-time mission control dashboard for OpenClaw AI agent workspaces. It provides agent monitoring, Kanban task management, role-based team access, live activity feeds, document management, broadcast messaging, and secure WebSocket connections to OpenClaw gateway instances. Synclaw supports both Public WSS (hosted gateway) and self-hosted BYO OpenClaw deployments.

## Docs

- [Documentation Index](https://synclaw.in/docs): Setup guides, deployment options, and operational reference
- [Public WSS Setup](https://synclaw.in/docs/public-wss): Fastest way to connect -- BYO OpenClaw with hosted gateway
- [Self-Hosted Setup](https://synclaw.in/docs/self-hosted): Full infrastructure ownership deployment guide
- [Cloud Hosting](https://synclaw.in/docs/cloud): Managed cloud provisioning (Hostinger, DigitalOcean, AWS)
- [Hosting Reference](https://synclaw.in/docs/hosting): Canonical setup, environment variables, and configuration
- [Webhooks](https://synclaw.in/docs/hosting/webhooks): Event-driven automation with HMAC-SHA256 validation
- [Webhook Security](https://synclaw.in/docs/hosting/webhooks/security): Secret validation and rate limiting
- [Troubleshooting](https://synclaw.in/docs/hosting/troubleshooting): Common issues and fixes
- [FAQ](https://synclaw.in/docs/faq): Common deployment and operational questions
- [Pricing](https://synclaw.in/docs/pricing): Free, Starter, and Pro plan comparison

## Help

- [Getting Started](https://synclaw.in/help/getting-started): First-time setup walkthrough
- [Agent Setup](https://synclaw.in/help/agent-setup): Creating and configuring AI agents
- [Help Center](https://synclaw.in/help): Guides and tutorials

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://synclaw.in/privacy): Data handling and retention practices
- [Homepage](https://synclaw.in): Product overview and signup
